LinkedIn Marketing Solutions is LinkedIn's suite of B2B advertising and lead generation products, including Sponsored Content, Lead Gen Forms, and the Campaign Manager platform. It enables precise targeting of professional audiences by job title, industry, company size, and seniority — particularly relevant for Janus Digital's commercial outreach to enterprise decision-makers.
